3206040.name: Runes of Vespera
3206040.description:
Runes of Vespera is a roguelite FPS survival game with vintage, arcade-style visuals. The rules and gameplay are simple but the choices you make substantially affect the outcome of the game. Survive hordes of nightmarish horrors and reanimated creatures, capture their souls, and sacrifice your kills at an altar for a reward from the Gods. Get new weapons off the wall, collect tons of gold, and find secret runes. Buy permanent upgrades at the end of each round with gold you collect from the level to enhance your character's abilities.

Your goal is simple: survive as long as you can, and uncover the Runes of Vespera.
